validation.required-fields: Please fill in all required fields.
validation.company-id-required: "companyId" must be a non-empty string when provided.

auth.user-already-exists: An account already exists for {{email}}. Sign in below to continue.
auth.invalid-email-or-password: Email or password do not match a Paperclip account.
auth.request-failed-422: An account may already exist for {{email}}. Try signing in.
auth.forbidden: You do not have permission for this action.

branding.ceo-only: Only CEO agents can update company branding.

capability.ceo-only: Only CEO agents can manage company {{capability}}.

settings.ceo-or-board-only: Only CEO agents or board users may update company settings.

member.last-owner: Cannot remove the last active owner.

invite.already-member: You already belong to this company.
invite.token-generation-failed: Failed to generate a unique invite token. Please try again.
invite.bootstrap-human-only: Bootstrap invite requires human request type.
invite.agent-name-required: agentName is required for agent join requests.

assignee.not-member: Assignee must be a member of the company.

agent.shortname-ambiguous: Agent shortname is ambiguous in this company. Use the agent ID.
agent.shortname-needs-company: Agent shortname lookup requires companyId query parameter.
agent.environment-cross-company: Selected environment must belong to the same company.
agent.environment-driver-not-allowed: Environment driver "{{driver}}" is not allowed here.

project.shortname-ambiguous: Project shortname is ambiguous in this company. Use the project ID.

routine.agent-self-only: Agents can only manage routines assigned to themselves.
routine.assign-self-only: Agents can only assign routines to themselves.

plugin.webhook-not-enabled: Webhook-scoped plugin API routes require a signature verifier enabled.

checkout.issueid-required: Checkout-protected plugin API routes require an issueId route parameter.

board-claim.signin-required: Sign in before claiming board ownership.
board-claim.expired: Board claim challenge expired. Start a new claim.
board-claim.unavailable: Board claim challenge is no longer available.

cli-auth.signin-required: Sign in before approving CLI access.

join-request.agent-claim-only: Only agent join requests can claim API keys.
join-request.must-be-approved: Join request must be approved before key claim.
